objective.c: 理解零因積性質：(x−a)(x−b)=0 ⟺ x=a 或 x=b
objective.e: Understand the zero-product property: (x−a)(x−b)=0 means x=a or x=b

config.levels: comma list of stage kinds 1-6, subset and order kept, e.g. 4,5,6
config.rounds: buildings per stage: one number for all stages or a per-stage list (default 1,2,2,2,2,3)
config.grace: seconds of all-pillars-down countdown before the collapse in multi (default 6, 0 = off)
config.diff: easy | std | hard (easy: 1 round per stage, longer fuses; hard: adds a 3-building mixed street)
config.inqrounds: 探究模式: rounds per inquiry stage (default 5)
config.inqfuse: 探究模式: seconds per answer window (default 15)
config.inqhearts: 探究模式: lives per player for the whole arc (default 6; at 0 the player rebuilds for one round and returns with 2)
